file_insights.purpose: Content service layer with CRUD operations and state management

patterns_discovered.description: All methods are async, accepting AsyncSession for database operations
Before updating content, a snapshot of previous state is created
Channels stored as JSON strings rather than relationships

gotchas_discovered.description: VALID_TRANSITIONS[ContentStatus.PUBLISHED] = [] means published content cannot transition back
gotchas_discovered.impact: May be intentional design but limits flexibility

gotchas_discovered.description: list() method returns all results without pagination or limit
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could cause performance issues with large datasets

gotchas_discovered.description: Channels stored as JSON strings, making filtering with .contains() database-dependent
gotchas_discovered.impact: May not work consistently across different database backends

gotchas_discovered.description: _create_version_snapshot creates ContentVersion but doesn't explicitly commit
gotchas_discovered.impact: Version snapshot transaction may not be isolated from main update

features_implemented: Full CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Status transition validation with state machine
Filtering by status, content_type, and channel

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination support to list() method
recommendations.rationale: Prevent memory and database strain with large datasets
recommendations.suggested_implementation: Add limit and offset parameters to ContentListParams

recommendations.recommendation: Reconsider JSON storage for channels field
recommendations.rationale: Use proper database relationships or JSONB type for better filtering
recommendations.suggested_implementation: Create Channel relationship model or use JSONB array type

recommendations.recommendation: Implement soft deletes instead of hard deletes
recommendations.rationale: Preserve audit trail and allow recovery of deleted content
recommendations.suggested_implementation: Add deleted_at timestamp field to ContentItem

recommendations.recommendation: Add structured logging for state transitions
recommendations.suggested_implementation: Add logger.info calls in transition_status() method

recommendations.recommendation: Consider explicit transaction management for version snapshots
recommendations.rationale: Ensure version snapshots are durably committed
recommendations.suggested_implementation: Wrap version creation in savepoint or explicit commit
